noTitle.description: No title — dialog uses aria-label fallback

veryLongTitle.title: This is an extremely long modal title that should truncate gracefully without breaking the header layout

emptyBody.title: Empty body
emptyBody.description: Modal with header + footer but no body content

bodyOnly.title: No footer
bodyOnly.description: Modal with header + body but no footer — close via button or Escape

richContent.title: Rich content
richContent.description: Modal body with mixed content: headings, paragraphs, lists, code blocks

scrollableContent.title: Scrollable body
scrollableContent.description: 12+ paragraphs — body scrolls while header and footer remain fixed
